name: aegisops-autopilot
description: Qwen-powered production incident autopilot with persistent memory, tool evidence, risk-scored planning, and human approval gates.

tools.name: log_search
tools.purpose: Search incident-correlated log patterns and return audit-safe excerpts.

tools.name: metric_probe
tools.purpose: Probe SLI and health signals for the affected service.

tools.name: change_graph
tools.purpose: Inspect recent changes overlapping the alert window.

tools.name: policy_check
tools.purpose: Evaluate hard stops, approval requirements, and mutation policy.

tools.name: remediation_simulator
tools.purpose: Dry-run reversible remediation plans without production mutation.
